doc: Negatives are config, not metrics -> read via the connector-action GAQL path (keyword.list), NOT query_data. Reads route through the `execute` meta-tool (the dispatcher is flagged destructive; a *.list is non-mutating). Account params go inside `params`. MCP paths: ../../../../_framework/porter-mcp-calls.md

account.use: FULL object -> source_user_id, company_id, and id '<CUSTOMER_ID>-<LOGIN_CUSTOMER_ID>'

params.query: SELECT campaign.name, campaign_criterion.keyword.text, campaign_criterion.keyword.match_type, campaign_criterion.status FROM campaign_criterion WHERE campaign_criterion.type = 'KEYWORD' AND campaign_criterion.negative = TRUE

SELECT campaign.name, ad_group.name, ad_group_criterion.keyword.text, ad_group_criterion.keyword.match_type, ad_group_criterion.status FROM ad_group_criterion WHERE ad_group_criterion.type = 'KEYWORD' AND ad_group_criterion.negative = TRUE AND ad_group_criterion.status != 'REMOVED'
SELECT shared_set.name, shared_set.type, shared_criterion.keyword.text, shared_criterion.keyword.match_type FROM shared_criterion

queries.note: ONLY for the conflict audit — active positive keywords (negative = FALSE)

params.query: SELECT campaign.name, ad_group.name, ad_group_criterion.keyword.text, ad_group_criterion.keyword.match_type FROM ad_group_criterion WHERE ad_group_criterion.type = 'KEYWORD' AND ad_group_criterion.negative = FALSE AND ad_group_criterion.status = 'ENABLED'

process: assemble the 4 bodies into negatives_raw.json {campaign, ad_group, shared, links}; process.py negatives_raw.json [candidates.json] -> { summary, inventory, candidates? }
